notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __scUserOsintModal) titled 'Snapchat Profile Information'. Reads page HTML for pageType (must be '18' for public profile), dateCreated/dateModified via regex, then parses __NEXT_DATA__ JSON for username, title, bio, address, websiteUrl. Dates shown with dual ISO+local format and 🚨 if within 7 days. Export row includes Text/JSON/Excel Row/Excel Headers buttons plus Extracted timestamp pinned at right. Fails with alert('Sorry. This Snapchat user has no public profile.') if pageType !== 18.
